metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_1496
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Amphiphysin 2/BIN1 forms heterodimers with Amphyphysin 1 and enhances clathrin-mediated endocytosis as observed in an heterologous transferrin uptake assay. The same paper describes the occurence of Amphyphysin 2 in presynaptic terminals.

13/12/2017 Pim
- The function of BIN1_RAT/Amphyphysin II in the process of 'synaptic vesicle endocytosis (GO:0048488)' is not shown directly, but inferred from the authors from (1) the known role of Amph1 in this process, (2) the in vivo participation of Amph1 and Amph2 in the same protein complex, (3) the localization of Amph2 on the membrane of SVs and (4) the role of Amph2 in CDE in a heterologous system. I allow this inference w/o a IC structure.. Experimental description: "Amph1 was cloned from a Matchmaker rat brain cDNA library ... The Amph2 splice variants Amph2-1 (seven clones) ... were found while screening the brain cDNA library for Amph1 isoforms". p. 2004

checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
